## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content marketing services and explore potential collaboration with Norm AI.](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has evolved their content strategy to focus on LLM visibility and personalized, long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Their process involves deep research, context engineering, and AI-powered content creation with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint followed by ongoing execution, suitable for companies of various sizes](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Norm AI could benefit from thought leadership content to establish credibility in the compliance/AI regulation space](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)

## Topics

### Norm AI's Current Situation

  - [Started 2023 with 30 people, now at 90, aiming for 110-120 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Breaking into double-digit ARR this year, plan to at least double next year](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Land and expand go-to-market motion in financial services (e.g., Vanguard, Blackstone, BlackRock, JP Morgan)](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Expanding product footprint to go wide within client companies](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Osman (sole marketing team member) has 5 open headcount, including head of demand gen and director of product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### GrowthX's Evolved Content Strategy

  - [Focus on LLM visibility and its impact on website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Creating hyper-personalized, long-tail content to match changing user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Seeing 4x more valuable traffic due to higher intent from LLM-informed visitors](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Process includes deep research, context engineering, and AI-powered content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Use of AI agents for tasks like expert review and fact-checking in specialized industries](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### GrowthX's Platform and Workflow

  - [Context engine ingests company information, competitor data, and research](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [AI-powered editor with context-aware suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Workflow engine creates executable plans for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Fact-checking and expert review processes for accuracy and compliance](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Image generation capabilities aligned with brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)

### Client Examples and Results

  - [Augment Code: Rapidly gaining visibility in AI coding tool queries](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Biologica: Creating thought leadership content for supplement industry launch](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2354.0)
  - [Ramp: Long-term collaboration driving content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

### Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint to set foundation and create artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Defaults into longer commitment after initial sprint](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [100% conversion rate from strategy sprints in the last three months](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Flexible content placement options (blog, guides, custom sections)](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Suitable for various team sizes, from founder-only to large marketing departments](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Norm AI a sample proposal and details on potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2750.0)
  - [Share dates for upcoming kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2750.0)
  - [Osman to review proposal and example clients similar to Norm AI's situation](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2776.0)
  - [Consider starting with thought leadership content to establish credibility in the compliance/AI regulation space](https://fathom.video/share/JFLZzyx2Mb889_hmtWEZFwA3z2q3jzwz?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
